# Minty Flow

Minty Flow is a free, open-source, privacy-first expense tracker for Android. Works 100% offline with no account required. All data stays on your device.

## Pages

- [Home](https://minty-flow-web.adelefaell.workers.dev/)
- [FAQ](https://minty-flow-web.adelefaell.workers.dev/faq)
- [Privacy Policy](https://minty-flow-web.adelefaell.workers.dev/privacy)
- [Changelog](https://minty-flow-web.adelefaell.workers.dev/changelog)
- [Sitemap](https://minty-flow-web.adelefaell.workers.dev/sitemap.xml)

## Source

- [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/Minty-Flow)
- [App Repository](https://github.com/Minty-Flow/minty-flow-app)

## Download

- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mintyflow.tracker)
